result.summary: Found 3 issues: one major layout overlap hiding legal disclaimer text, one minor accessibility concern with fine print, and one minor styling observation.

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' sticky/floating button overlaps the legal disclaimer fine print text at the bottom of the page, making a significant portion of the mandatory terms and conditions unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Reposition the 'SCROLL DOWN' call-to-action so it does not overlap the legal disclaimer text, or place it above the fine print section. Ensure the full disclaimer is always visible and not obstructed by any UI element.

issues.description: The legal disclaimer fine print text is extremely small (appears to be around 8-9px) and rendered in low contrast against the white background, making it nearly impossible to read even without the overlay obstruction.
issues.suggestion: Increase the font size of the disclaimer text to at least 12px and ensure sufficient color contrast (minimum 4.5:1 ratio) to meet WCAG AA accessibility standards.

issues.description: The two bottom promotional panels (100% Poker Bonus Match and Second Chance Bonus Bet) appear to be cut off at the bottom of the viewport, with no clear visual indicator that there is more content below beyond the 'SCROLL DOWN' prompt.
issues.suggestion: Consider showing partial content of the next section to visually indicate scrollability, or ensure the scroll indicator is clearly visible and not obstructed.
